text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hold up, Fuji. I know you did it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Don't play dumb! You're the one who put that
box next to my pillow!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, well, that was supposed to be your birthday
present... I take it you didn't like it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I was real thankful at first when I thought it was a
nice gift. But then when I opened it, a damn
jack-in-the-box jumped out at me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And it made such a ruckus that it woke me up
fast.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, so my surprise was a success!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, but... that wasn't the only surprise in there.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're gonna shock me with somethin' else?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The main gift is hidden in the bottom... Hehe,
happy birthday, Hishiama.
